title: Prof. Dr. Talia Bali AYKAN Multidisciplinary Laboratory

Our laboratory is located in the Faculty of Medicine at the NP Campus of our university. A suitable environment has been created for students to turn their theoretical knowledge into practice. With the help of the training microscope with camera and connected imaging systems, training preparations can be shown to all students at the same time. Afterwards, students reinforce their theoretical knowledge with their own binocular microscopes as a practical application with the help of preparations. In the laboratory, Histology and Embryology practicals as well as Medical Pathology practicals are also carried out.

Prof. Dr. Talia Bali Aykan Laboratory is used by the following departments

Histology and Embryology

Medical Pathology
